assessment.note: She answered an observation-stage clarity probe with a concrete strain signal: constant context switching is leaving her unsure where to contribute; also reveals wellbeing pressure. [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'constant context switching' could be worth unpacking next session, but drill cap requires stage advance.

new_queue.label: Arrival context
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately?
new_queue.description: Gives Elena a low-pressure opening to set context in her own words before anything specific is raised.

new_queue.label: Load pressure
new_queue.name: What part of your current load is hardest to keep in balance?
new_queue.description: Checks whether the strain is coming from calendar load, context switching, or something else in the setup.

new_queue.label: Open invitation
new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?
new_queue.description: Intentionally open; lets them name the thing before the manager assumes.

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: Where would a bit more support make the biggest difference right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the most useful form of manager help without forcing her to frame it as a complaint.

new_queue.label: Next step
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have changed by our next conversation?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into a specific next move with a clear time horizon.
